title: Local Field Execution Gate Design Export
objective: Add a browser-local field execution gate design export that maps the future approval, import, lead assignment, field authorization, schedule/status, durable field record, and production tracking packets before any of those write paths are admitted.
scope: Add an Export Field Execution Gate Design action to the existing Field Prep Outputs rail.

Download one JSON artifact that includes the current field-start preflight summary, future route map, minimum admission packet sequence, execution gate statuses, authority boundary flags, and blocked write boundaries.
Keep the export local-only and informational.
Extend the focused Playwright smoke to prove the downloaded field execution gate design artifact and zero mutation requests.
not_allowed: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares action.
No secret access or secret rotation.
No backend route or mutation route change.

No project import, workpackage rows, task rows, apparatus rows, field work authorization, lead assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking, workbook macro, or workbook writeback.
No service, auth, DNS, ingress, or control-plane widening.

field_execution_gate.note: This lane creates local design context only. Approval first row, project import, field authorization, lead assignment, schedule/status changes, durable field records, and production tracking remain blocked until later admitted packets own those write paths.

validation_steps: rg -n "PM Lane 149|Export Field Execution Gate Design|field-execution-gate-design|pm_lane_149_local_field_execution_gate_design_v1|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS: operations-web typecheck passed, operations-web production build passed, focused PM import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed, packet JSON parsed, guardrail search confirmed PM Lane 149/field-execution-gate-design/zero-mutation evidence plus Desktop Codex parked language, and git diff --check passed.
sidecar_result: Desktop Codex NETA comparative-audit, topic-spine design, and pilot-module blueprint closeouts remain untracked and intentionally parked for a separate technical-authority review lane. They are not staged into PM Lane 149.
next_recommended_lane: Use this field execution gate design as the no-write map for the Temp Power pilot. The next PM lane may either prepare one of the named field/import admission packets or pause for the explicit PM Lane 142 live approval admission before any approval POST or import mutation.
